retention.admin: Admin projects never expire and won't be removed by routine cleanup.
retention.user: Each project is kept for up to 7 days, then deleted automatically. Download your result files in time.

card.backupCheckboxTitle: Select to back up to cloud drive

rename.title: Rename task
rename.description: Up to about 12 Chinese characters. A random suffix is appended automatically if the name collides with an existing task.
rename.label: New task name
rename.badChar: Cannot contain {lt} {gt} quotes / \ or null characters

toast.loadListFailed: Failed to load the project list
toast.deleteFailed: Delete failed, please try again later
toast.cancelFailed: Cancel failed, please try again later
toast.bulkBackupConfirm:
Back up {count} completed {count, plural, one {task} other {tasks}} to the cloud drive?

For each task we will:
• Pack the project directory into a tar.gz
• Upload it across borders to the admin cloud drive (~15-30 min for a 1GB task)
• On success, mark the task as "Archived" and delete the local source files

Failed tasks can be retried individually at /admin/pan/backups.
